entry.title: How to switch between monitors from the terminal
CSS simple image background
entry.summary: A simple way of showing nice and colourful backgrounds for images is by reusing the image itself as a background and then applying a large amount of blur on top of it.

entry.title: Introducing an aquatic simulation of Boids
entry.summary: During summer vacation, I wanted to do a short weekend project and try to simulate a school of fish that would swim around on the screen.

entry.title: Quotes
entry.summary: This is a personal collection of engineering quotes by other people.

entry.title: The drunken bishop
entry.summary: How do you easily compare long, complex strings such as digital fingerprints or cryptographic hashes?

entry.title: HTTP Live Streaming
entry.summary: HTTP Live Streaming is a protocol originally developed by Apple and it allows you to stream A/V media over HTTP.

entry.title: Markdown reference
entry.summary: A quick reference page for most of this blog's flavour of Markdown.

entry.title: Hello world
entry.summary: Hello world! This is the introduction and documentation of my site.

entry.title: Reference Archive
entry.summary: Various reference material, mostly from third parties.
